gems.name: rtfm-filemanager
gems.info: A full featured terminal file manager with syntax highlighted files, images shown in the terminal, videos thumbnailed, etc. Features include remote SSH/SFTP browsing, interactive SSH shell, comprehensive undo system, OpenAI integration, bookmarks, archive browsing, and much more. v8.2: Plugin system with live enable/disable, built-in plugin manager (V key), and example plugins (settings editor, git operations, bookmarks, notes, custom file openers).
